instructions: 1. Open https://wrtn.ai in Chrome
2. Wait for chat interface to fully load
3. Take BASELINE screenshot (before sending any message)
4. Open DevTools → Network tab (clear existing entries)
5. Type a test message: 안녕하세요 테스트입니다
6. Press Enter and wait 10-15 seconds for response
7. Take RESPONSE screenshot (after AI responds)
8. In DevTools Network tab, note:
a. What API endpoint was called? (URL path)
b. Request method (POST/GET)?
c. Response Content-Type?
d. Response status code?
e. Is it SSE (text/event-stream) or JSON?
f. Any WebSocket connections? (filter WS)
9. Click on the main API request → check Response tab
a. What format is the response? (SSE events, JSON, etc.)
b. Copy first 500 chars of response body if visible
10. Check page source (Ctrl+U or View Source):
a. Is it React/Next.js (look for __next, data-reactroot)?
b. Is it Vue (data-v- attributes)?
11. Take a screenshot of DevTools Network tab showing the API call details
12. BLOCK TEST: Now type a message with keyword:
내 비밀번호는 abc123 입니다
13. Observe what happens when blocked:
a. Does the chat show any error message?
b. Does the response area show anything? (spinner, empty, error?)
c. Take screenshot of the blocked state
14. Check DevTools for the blocked request status
params.purpose: Capture wrtn frontend profile for Phase 5 warning design. Need to understand how wrtn renders responses and how the block manifests in the UI, to design an effective warning message.

expected_output.api_info: endpoint URL, method, content-type, response format

notes: wrtn Phase 4 frontend-inspect. 차단 확인 완료 (#476 ALL_PASS). 경고 표시를 위한 프론트엔드 프로파일 캡처. wrtn은 HTTP/2 fetch/SSE 사용, response_type=openai_compat_sse.
